title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dunzo International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dunzo International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Dunzo International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Dunzo International Enterprises:
Dunzo International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo International Enterprises!
